title: CoapOption::as_uint silently truncates options longer than 4 bytes
notes: Fixed by changing as_uint to return Result<u32, CoapError> with validation for len <=4; updated callers and error handling. Commit: 8a582a91e
close_reason: Implemented validation in as_uint() returning Result to prevent silent truncation on malformed options; updated error enum, Display, callers in tests and dispatch. Follows correctness fix.
